title: poset_phase v3.0.0: Action-Weighted Poset Ensemble Analysis — Prediction C: Hierarchy Depth Predicts Entropy
description: Exact numerical framework for studying geometric phase transitions in finite partially ordered sets (posets). v3.0.0 adds Prediction C: a three-tier correlational study showing hierarchy depth observables (HII composite) predict combinatorial entropy in finite causal posets. Tier 1: all-family partial correlation r = -0.578 (320 samples). Tier 2: matched-pair r = -0.834 (46 Lor2D-MLR pairs, N=30-56), stable across three filter stringencies. Tier 3: CG stability linkage r = -0.874 (92 samples). Includes Simpson's Paradox diagnosis, component decomposition, and full manuscript (788 lines, 14 tables). Previous versions include Prediction B (bounded phase transition threshold, γ_c = O(1)) and Prediction A (4D Lorentzian dominance, N=20-72).
notes: This software accompanies three manuscripts: (1) Prediction B — 'Bounded Geometric Phase Transition in Finite Causal Posets with Exact Entropy', (2) Prediction A — 'Dimension-Agnostic Geometric Dominance in Finite Causal Posets', (3) Prediction C — 'Hierarchy Depth Observables Predict Combinatorial Entropy in Finite Causal Posets: A Three-Tier Correlational Study'. AI tools (Claude, Anthropic) assisted with code development and analysis.
